title: Infernal Touch
description: Infernal Touch is a Minecraft Fabric mod that adds an enchantment for automatic smelting while mining.
body:
# Infernal Touch

A Minecraft Fabric mod that adds the **Infernal Touch** enchantment - automatically smelt blocks as you mine them!

Smelting Iron Using [Ore Harvester](https://modrinth.com/mod/ore-harvester) to Iron Ingots

![Smelting Iron](https://media.giphy.com/media/yApLtbPY9R98zLNhUh/giphy.gif)


## How it Works

The Infernal Touch enchantment automatically converts mined blocks into their smelted form:
- Stone → Stone (instead of cobblestone)
- Iron Ore → Iron Ingot
- Gold Ore → Gold Ingot
- Sand → Glass
- Clay → Terracotta
- Works on Modded Ores too
  
## Enchantment Details

- **Rarity**: Common (weight 10)
- **Compatible with**: Fortune, Unbreaking, Mending, etc.
- **Applies to**: All mining tools (pickaxes, shovels, axes)
- **Available in**: Enchanting table, villager trades, loot chests.


## Showcase
Smelting Cobblestone Using [Just Hammers](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-hammers) Mod.

![Smelting Cobblestone](https://media.giphy.com/media/9cuFg7GcWDrO7o9XEu/giphy.gif)


Smelting Sand to Glass.

![Smelting Sand](https://media.giphy.com/media/mpDB8R61EnBsunsyTB/giphy.gif)
